name: Quick Cash Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Tampa-based pawn shop buying and loaning on jewelry, electronics, watches, and collectibles since 2010. Fast cash for items or collateral-based loans.
description_long:
Quick Cash Pawn & Jewelry has operated in Tampa, Florida since 2010, located in the Fresco y Más Plaza at 8404 Sheldon Road. The business is owned by Tony, who emphasizes relationship-building and professional service as core to the company's philosophy. The pawn industry has evolved significantly in recent years, partly due to increased mainstream awareness from television programs like "Pawn Stars," which has broadened the customer base beyond traditional pawn shop users.

Quick Cash Pawn offers two primary services: customers can sell items outright or use merchandise as collateral for cash loans. Their inventory includes jewelry, diamonds, Rolex watches, electronics (cell phones, laptops, tablets), amplifiers, and surround sound systems. The company describes itself as offering a "huge selection" of previously owned merchandise at prices below retail. They provide estimates for potential transactions and advertise a fast and easy loan process.

The company differentiates itself by positioning itself as customer-friendly and relationship-oriented, contrasting with stereotypical pawn shop experiences. Tony's messaging emphasizes treating customers "like an old friend, not a dollar" and providing courteous professional service. The business appeals to bargain shoppers seeking used items at reduced prices, as well as individuals needing immediate cash without credit checks or traditional lending requirements.

Quick Cash Pawn is a straightforward collateral-based lending operation with no claims of credit repair, financial counseling, or credit-building services. As a pawn shop, it offers immediate liquidity but requires customers to forfeit items or accept interest rates and terms typical of secured lending. Customers should understand that pawn loans are short-term solutions, not alternatives to traditional credit, and that unredeemed collateral is sold by the shop.
pros: In business since 2010, indicating established local presence and operational stability
Accepts wide range of collateral including jewelry, electronics, watches, and diamonds—more flexible than some lenders
No credit check required; based on item value, not creditworthiness
Fast cash available same-day, suitable for emergency liquidity needs
Huge inventory of used merchandise available for purchase at below-retail prices
Owner-operated with emphasis on personal relationships and customer service
Transparent 4-step loan process advertised on website
cons: Pawn loans are short-term solutions with redemption deadlines; customers must repay or lose collateral
Interest rates and fees not disclosed on website—typical pawn shop rates can be high (15-240% APR equivalent depending on loan term)
No credit-building benefit; pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus
Limited to customers with physical items of value to pledge or sell
Minimal online presence and lack of transparent pricing or rate information
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, watches)
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted used merchandise below retail prices
Customers seeking collateral-based loans without credit checks or traditional lending requirements
People in temporary cash flow situations who can redeem items within the pawn loan period
diagnosis: Quick Cash Pawn is best for individuals with valuable items who need immediate cash without credit verification. Primary caveat: pawn loans are short-term obligations with high effective interest rates and strict redemption deadlines; unredeemed collateral is forfeited and sold, making this a last-resort lending option rather than a sustainable credit solution.
services: Cash for gold, jewelry, and diamonds
Audio equipment buying (amplifiers, surround sound systems)
